title: [  Development of an AI-Powered Agricultural Drone System with Live Video Monitoring and Computer Vision for Real-Time Coconut Maturity Detection ]
description: [ Development of an AI-Powered Agricultural Drone System with Live Video Monitoring and Computer Vision for Real-Time Coconut Maturity Detection** is a project that develops a drone-based monitoring system to assist coconut farmers in identifying coconuts that are ready for harvest. The farmer manually operates the drone while its high-definition camera streams live video to a computer or mobile application. Using Artificial Intelligence (AI) and computer vision, the system analyzes the live video in real time, detects coconuts, and classifies their maturity level as **Ready to Harvest**, **Nearly Mature**, or **Not Yet Ready**. The detection results are displayed directly on the live video through bounding boxes and labels, allowing the farmer to monitor the plantation more efficiently. The system can also capture images, save inspection records, and generate reports to support harvest planning and decision-making. This project aims to reduce manual inspection time, improve harvesting efficiency, and provide farmers with a smarter and more convenient way of managing coconut plantations. ]
objectives: [ **Development of an AI-Powered Agricultural Drone System with Live Video Monitoring and Computer Vision for Real-Time Coconut Maturity Detection** is a project nga mo develops og drone-based monitoring system aron matabangan ang mga coconut farmers sa pag-identify sa mga lubi nga ready na i-harvest. Ang farmer maoy manually mo-operate sa drone while ang high-definition camera niini mag-stream og live video ngadto sa computer o mobile application. Gamit ang Artificial Intelligence (AI) ug computer vision, ang system mo-analyze sa live video in real time, mo-detect ug mga lubi, ug mo-classify sa ilang maturity level nga **Ready to Harvest**, **Nearly Mature**, o **Not Yet Ready**. Ang detection results ipakita diretso sa live video pinaagi sa bounding boxes ug labels aron mas dali ug mas detailed nga pag-monitor sa farmer sa iyang coconut plantation. Ang system mahimo usab og pag-capture sa images, pag-save sa inspection records, ug pag-generate og reports aron makatabang sa harvest planning ug decision-making. This project aims to reduce manual inspection time, improve harvesting efficiency, ug maghatag sa mga farmers og mas smart ug convenient nga paagi sa pagdumala sa ilang coconut farms. ]

title: [ Development of an Intelligent Hydroponic Greenhouse Management System with User-Configurable Automation, Nutrient Regulation, Environmental Control, and SMS-Based Alert Notifications ]
description: [ Development of an Intelligent Hydroponic Greenhouse Management System with User-Configurable Automation, Nutrient Regulation, Environmental Control, and SMS-Based Alert Notifications** is a project that develops a smart hydroponic greenhouse capable of automatically monitoring and controlling the environmental conditions required for plant growth. The farmer can configure settings such as temperature, humidity, water level, and nutrient concentration through a computer or mobile application. Based on these predefined settings, the system automatically operates devices such as pumps and fans to maintain optimal growing conditions. It also continuously monitors the status of the greenhouse and sends SMS notifications to the farmer whenever critical situations occur, such as low water level, low nutrient supply, abnormal temperature, or equipment malfunction. This system aims to improve crop production, reduce manual labor, and provide farmers with a more efficient and convenient way of managing hydroponic farming operations. ]
objectives: [ Development of an Intelligent Hydroponic Greenhouse Management System with User-Configurable Automation, Nutrient Regulation, Environmental Control, and SMS-Based Alert Notifications** is a project that develops a smart hydroponic greenhouse nga maghimo og automatic monitoring ug control sa environmental conditions nga gikinahanglan sa pagtubo sa mga tanom. Ang farmer maoy mo-configure sa desired settings sama sa temperature, humidity, water level, ug nutrient concentration pinaagi sa computer o mobile application. Based sa mga settings nga gi-set sa farmer, ang system automaticaly mo-control sa mga devices sama sa water pumps ug fans aron mapadayon ang optimal growing conditions sa mga tanom. Ang system also continuously monitors the greenhouse environment ug magpadala og SMS notifications sa farmer kung adunay critical conditions sama sa low water level, low nutrient supply, abnormal temperature, o malfunction sa equipment. This system aims to improve crop production, reduce manual labor, ug makatabang sa mas efficient ug convenient nga pagdumala sa hydroponic farming operations. ]

title: [ AI-Powered Underwater Environmental Monitoring System for Marine Waste Detection, Marine Life Assessment, and Water Quality Analysis ]
description: [ AI-Powered Underwater Environmental Monitoring System for Marine Waste Detection, Marine Life Assessment, and Water Quality Analysis is a project that develops an underwater monitoring system capable of collecting and analyzing environmental data using artificial intelligence (AI). The system may be installed on an underwater drone, remotely operated vehicle (ROV), or stationary monitoring platform equipped with cameras and sensors. As it operates underwater, the system captures images and environmental data, which are processed by AI algorithms to detect and classify marine waste such as plastic bottles, bags, fishing nets, and other debris. It can also identify and count marine organisms, helping assess marine biodiversity and population levels in a specific area. In addition, sensors measure important water quality parameters such as temperature, pH, turbidity, dissolved oxygen, and salinity to evaluate the overall health of the marine environment. The collected data can be displayed through a monitoring application, allowing researchers, environmental agencies, and local communities to make informed decisions regarding marine conservation and pollution management. ]
objectives: [ AI-Powered Underwater Environmental Monitoring System for Marine Waste Detection, Marine Life Assessment, and Water Quality Analysis is a project that develops an underwater monitoring system nga mag-collect ug mag-analyze sa environmental data gamit ang Artificial Intelligence (AI). Ang system mahimong i-install sa usa ka underwater drone o remotely operated vehicle (ROV) nga adunay camera ug environmental sensors. During operation, ang camera mo-capture og images ug videos underwater, ug ang AI maoy mo-analyze niini aron ma-detect ug ma-classify ang marine waste sama sa plastic bottles, plastic bags, fishing nets, ug uban pang basura sa dagat. The system can also identify and count marine organisms such as fish, corals, and other marine species aron ma-assess ang biodiversity ug population levels sa usa ka area. Dugang pa, ang sensors mosukod sa water quality parameters sama sa temperature, pH level, turbidity, dissolved oxygen, ug salinity aron ma-evaluate ang overall health sa aquatic environment. Ang collected data mahimong ma-display sa monitoring application para magamit sa researchers, environmental agencies, ug local communities sa pag-monitor sa marine ecosystems ug pagplano sa environmental conservation efforts. This system aims to support marine protection, improve environmental monitoring, ug makatabang sa pagdumala sa marine resources ug pollution control. ]
